bookmarks.name: DynamoDB Whitepaper
bookmarks.description: In-depth technical paper on Amazon DynamoDB, a fully managed NoSQL database service.

bookmarks.name: Kafka Communication Protocol
bookmarks.description: In-depth exploration of the Kafka communication protocol, including its architecture and design principles.

bookmarks.name: Workload Isolation Using Shuffle Sharding
bookmarks.description: AWS's mathematical approach to isolating tenants and reducing correlated failure blast radius.

bookmarks.name: Addressing Cascading Failures
bookmarks.description: A rigorous guide to retry storms, overload feedback loops, and the limits that stop them.

bookmarks.name: Brendan Gregg's USE Method
bookmarks.description: Systematic performance analysis methodology examining system resources for Utilization, Saturation, and Errors to quickly identify bottlenecks.

bookmarks.name: Thinking Methodically about Performance
bookmarks.description: The longer-form performance-investigation method behind USE, with practical examples.

bookmarks.name: CPU Utilization is Wrong
bookmarks.description: Why busy CPU percentage can hide the real limiter, and how to reason about IPC instead.

bookmarks.name: Poor Disk Performance
bookmarks.description: A production disk-latency investigation that applies resource analysis from symptom to storage tier.

bookmarks.name: What Every Programmer Should Know About Memory
bookmarks.description: The foundational deep dive into caches, NUMA, TLBs, and the memory hierarchy.

bookmarks.name: False Sharing
bookmarks.description: Kernel documentation on cache-line contention that silently destroys multicore throughput.

bookmarks.name: A Debugging Story: Corrupt Packets in AF_XDP
bookmarks.description: A tools-first kernel debugging investigation using tracing to separate application error from a Linux race.

bookmarks.name: A Decade of Major Cache Incidents at Twitter
bookmarks.description: Twelve cache failures distilled into recurring patterns: retries, cascading failures, and hardware surprises.

bookmarks.name: Memory Tuning a High Throughput Microservice
bookmarks.description: JVM heap and garbage-collection tuning tied directly to a service throughput target.

bookmarks.name: Tuning Java for High-Performance Services
bookmarks.description: How JVM heap and GC choices shape latency SLOs in production services.

bookmarks.name: Scaling Git's Garbage Collection
bookmarks.description: Object-store and disk-level garbage-collection mechanics at platform scale.

bookmarks.name: Pushing Discord's Limits with a Million+ Online Users
bookmarks.description: A concrete capacity and latency story for running an unusually large real-time workload.

bookmarks.name: How Discord Stores Trillions of Messages
bookmarks.description: Hot partitions, compaction, JVM pauses, request coalescing, and a zero-downtime Cassandra-to-Scylla migration.

bookmarks.name: How Figma Horizontally Scaled Postgres
bookmarks.description: How connection limits and replication constraints led Figma to a horizontally scalable Postgres architecture.

bookmarks.name: Lessons Learned from Sharding Postgres at Notion
bookmarks.description: A candid account of the storage and operational constraints that force a Postgres sharding migration.

bookmarks.name: The Great Re-shard
bookmarks.description: The mechanics and safeguards for adding Postgres capacity with a live, zero-downtime reshard.

bookmarks.name: Partitioning GitHub's Relational Databases to Handle Scale
bookmarks.description: Partitioning trade-offs where foreign keys, joins, and application ownership meet real database limits.

bookmarks.name: Horizontally Scaling the Rails Backend of Shop App with Vitess
bookmarks.description: A practical migration of a high-traffic relational workload onto Vitess sharding.

bookmarks.name: Scaling Datastores at Slack with Vitess
bookmarks.description: How a large multi-tenant SaaS moved its MySQL scaling boundary with Vitess.

bookmarks.name: Debugging Postgres Autovacuum Problems
bookmarks.description: Mechanism-level diagnostics for dead tuples, bloat, vacuum progress, and runaway maintenance debt.

bookmarks.name: Common Issues with Planner Statistics
bookmarks.description: A PostgreSQL committer's guide to the estimation errors that create unexpected bad plans.

bookmarks.name: Postgres Indexes, Partitioning and LockManager Scalability
bookmarks.description: How heavy partitioning can defeat fast-path locking and create a lock-manager scalability cliff.

bookmarks.name: Avoid Postgres Performance Cliffs with MultiXact IDs and Foreign Keys
bookmarks.description: An obscure but important write-path bottleneck caused by shared row locks and foreign keys.

bookmarks.name: The Insatiable Postgres Replication Slot
bookmarks.description: How an unconsumed replication slot retains WAL until disk becomes the outage mechanism.

bookmarks.name: Postgres 9.5: SKIP LOCKED for Row-Level Locking
bookmarks.description: The core row-locking primitive behind safe multi-worker database queues and schedulers.

bookmarks.name: B-Tree vs. LSM-Tree
bookmarks.description: Storage-engine trade-offs in read, write, space, and compaction amplification.

bookmarks.name: Lessons Learned from 10 Years of DynamoDB
bookmarks.description: A decade of storage, partitioning, and operational lessons from a managed key-value store.

bookmarks.name: Cache Made Consistent
bookmarks.description: How Meta handles invalidation races, thundering herds, and cache/database consistency at scale.

bookmarks.name: Delta: A Strongly Consistent Storage Service Using Chain Replication
bookmarks.description: Production chain replication: its failure model, consistency guarantees, and storage-service design.

bookmarks.name: ZippyDB: Facebook's General-Purpose Key-Value Store
bookmarks.description: RocksDB-based storage-engine choices wrapped in a distributed key-value architecture.

bookmarks.name: How Uber Serves 40 Million Reads per Second Using an Integrated Cache
bookmarks.description: How cache behavior and hit ratios inform an online-storage architecture at extreme read volume.

bookmarks.name: How Uber Optimized Cassandra Operations at Scale
bookmarks.description: Compaction, JVM, and disk-I/O work that turns Cassandra operations into a manageable fleet concern.

bookmarks.name: Server Bootstrap Optimization Using RocksDB
bookmarks.description: A search-service bootstrap redesign that reduces Redis pressure with local RocksDB, LSM tuning, offset recovery, and native-memory debugging.

bookmarks.name: Lazy Redis Is Better Redis
bookmarks.description: The design of Redis lazy freeing: avoiding delete-induced latency spikes while balancing memory pressure, cache misses, and threading.

bookmarks.name: Redis Persistence Demystified
bookmarks.description: A first-principles explanation of write, fsync, snapshots, AOF, and the durability guarantees a database can actually make.

bookmarks.name: How Stripe Processed $1 Trillion with Zero-Downtime Data Migrations
bookmarks.description: A high-availability data-migration playbook built around document databases and operational safety.

bookmarks.name: Meet Chrono, Dropbox's Consistent Metadata Cache
bookmarks.description: A consistent metadata cache designed to make cache invalidation safe rather than merely fast.

bookmarks.name: JunoDB: PayPal's Key-Value Store
bookmarks.description: Why PayPal built a key-value store and the replication and consistency decisions behind it.

bookmarks.name: Chronos: A Replacement for Cron
bookmarks.description: The classic explanation of why cron breaks at company scale and what a distributed scheduler must add.

bookmarks.name: Cadence Multi-Tenant Task Processing
bookmarks.description: How a durable workflow engine protects fair task processing when tenants have very different loads.

bookmarks.name: Netflix Conductor: A Microservices Orchestrator
bookmarks.description: A production workflow-orchestration design based on task queues and JSON-defined workflows.

bookmarks.name: Temporal Server Architecture
bookmarks.description: The architecture of durable execution: history, matching, persistence, and independently scaled task queues.

bookmarks.name: ZooKeeper Leader Election Recipe
bookmarks.description: The canonical ephemeral-sequential-node algorithm for leader election and failure detection.

bookmarks.name: Implementing a CronJob Controller
bookmarks.description: A step-by-step reconciliation loop for determining due, running, and expired scheduled work.

bookmarks.name: Netflix's High-Throughput, Low-Latency Priority Queueing System
bookmarks.description: A real priority-queue architecture designed for high throughput without sacrificing latency.

bookmarks.name: Making a Distributed Priority Queue Disaster-Ready
bookmarks.description: Disaster-readiness techniques for a distributed priority queue that must survive regional failures.
